title: tectaria buchholzii
intro: Tectaria buchholzii, also known as the "palm fern", is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tectaria buchholzii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Tectaria buchholzii can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
